changeSet.author: gfh
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO evaluation_reactions (id, evaluation_id, reaction, comment, created_at) VALUES (1, 1, 'AGREE', 'Согласен с оценкой.', '2026-04-04 09:00:00'), (2, 2, 'AGREE', NULL, '2026-04-04 09:10:00'), (3, 3, 'AGREE', 'Замечания учту.', '2026-04-04 09:15:00'), (4, 4, 'AGREE', NULL, '2026-04-04 09:20:00'), (5, 5, 'AGREE', 'Спасибо за обратную связь.', '2026-04-04 09:25:00');
INSERT INTO evaluation_files (id, evaluation_id, uploaded_by, original_name, storage_path, mime_type, file_size, uploaded_at) VALUES (1, 14, 16, 'appeal_evidence_1.pdf', '/seed/appeal-1.pdf', 'application/pdf', 12345, '2026-04-04 09:05:00'), (2, 21, 23, 'appeal_evidence_2.pdf', '/seed/appeal-2.pdf', 'application/pdf', 12345, '2026-04-04 09:35:00'), (3, 26, 28, 'appeal_evidence_3.pdf', '/seed/appeal-3.pdf', 'application/pdf', 12345, '2026-04-04 10:05:00');
